name: Lake Nepessing Golfland
about: Lake Nepessing Golfland is a family entertainment center in Lapeer, MI, featuring a variety of golf-related activities and other attractions. The venue includes a heated and covered outdoor driving range, indoor golf simulators with over 100 virtual courses, a challenging miniature golf course, go-karts, and a driving range. It is open year-round and offers services such as golf lessons, club repairs, and a junior golf program. The facility is family-owned and operated, providing a versatile environment for both serious practice and casual fun.
why_golfers_like_it: Heated and covered outdoor driving range for year-round practice
Over 100 virtual golf courses available on simulators
Swing analysis technology to improve game performance

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol mentioned on the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated whether clubs are provided, but it is recommended to bring your own for the best experience. Club rentals and repairs are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers hand-dipped ice cream on-site, but it is unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted. BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering miniature golf, go-karts, and a junior golf program.
